messages.subject: [R-sig-Geo] Online Course: LiDAR Data Analysis in R (9-11 June)
messages.subject_clean: Online Course: LiDAR Data Analysis in R (9-11 June)
messages.body_plain:
Dear all,
We are pleased to offer the online course "LiDAR Data Analysis in R" from 9-11 June. This 12-hour course will provide you with the essential knowledge and hands-on experience in analysing LiDAR data for ecological research using R.
 
You will learn the principles of LiDAR technology, how to process and classify point clouds, and how to generate terrain and canopy models. The course also includes advanced techniques for extracting forest metrics and analyzing vegetation structure. By the end, you will be equipped with the skills to handle and analyze LiDAR data efficiently using the lidR package in R.
 
For more information, please visit: [ https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/lidar-r/ ]( https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/lidar-r/ )
Best regards,Carlo
--------------------

Carlo Pecoraro, Ph.D


Physalia-courses DIRECTOR

info at physalia-courses.org

mobile: +49 17645230846

[ Bluesky ]( https://bsky.app/profile/physaliacourses.bsky.social ) [ Linkedin ]( https://www.linkedin.com/in/physalia-courses-a64418127/ )

messages.subject: [R-sig-Geo] Spatial Data Visualization in R course - online, 17-19 June
messages.subject_clean: Spatial Data Visualization in R course - online, 17-19 June
messages.body_plain:
Dear all,
We are pleased to announce the upcoming "Spatial Data Visualization in R" course, running from 17th to 19th June, held online to encourage global participation.
 
Course website: [ https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/spatial-dataviz/ ]( https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/spatial-dataviz/ )
 
This course offers a comprehensive introduction to spatial data analysis, focusing on visualizing spatial matrices and point patterns, with a dedicated module on designing accessible, colorblind-friendly visualizations ? an essential skill for modern scientific communication.
 
Key learning outcomes include:
 
- Visualizing Remote Sensing Data
- Understanding Spatial Variability 
- Analyzing Temporal Variability
- Utilizing Spatial Analysis Techniques
- Addressing Accessibility in Scientific Visualization
 
Daily schedule: 3:00 PM ? 6:00 PM (Berlin time)
No prior R experience is required ? this course is suitable for both beginners and those looking to enhance their visualization skills.
 
Best regards,
Carlo
--------------------

Carlo Pecoraro, Ph.D


Physalia-courses DIRECTOR

info at physalia-courses.org

mobile: +49 17645230846

[ Bluesky ]( https://bsky.app/profile/physaliacourses.bsky.social ) [ Linkedin ]( https://www.linkedin.com/in/physalia-courses-a64418127/ )

messages.subject: [R-sig-Geo] Online Course: Interactive Maps with R (May 13-14)
messages.subject_clean: Online Course: Interactive Maps with R (May 13-14)
messages.body_plain:
Dear all,
We are excited to announce our upcoming Interactive Maps with R course, taking place online on May 13-14. This course will provide hands-on training in creating dynamic, interactive maps using R, equipping participants with essential skills for visualizing and sharing spatial data effectively.
 
Course website: [ https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/interactive-maps-with-r/ ]( https://www.physalia-courses.org/courses-workshops/interactive-maps-with-r/ ) 
 
At the end of this course, participants will:
Learn how to build and customize interactive maps with R packages like leaflet and mapview.
Work with external and custom spatial data to create engaging visualizations.
Explore techniques for publishing and sharing maps with collaborators and the public.
Gain practical experience through annotated R scripts and hands-on exercises.
This course is ideal for students, researchers, and professionals looking to enhance their spatial data visualization skills. Basic R knowledge is recommended, and installation instructions will be provided before the course.
 
Best regards,Carlo
 
 
 

--------------------

Carlo Pecoraro, Ph.D


Physalia-courses DIRECTOR

info at physalia-courses.org

mobile: +49 17645230846

[ Bluesky ]( https://bsky.app/profile/physaliacourses.bsky.social ) [ Linkedin ]( https://www.linkedin.com/in/physalia-courses-a64418127/ )

messages.subject: [R-sig-Geo] Instats & ASA Launch Free Research Training for U.S. Government Employees
messages.subject_clean: Instats & ASA Launch Free Research Training for U.S. Government Employees
messages.body_plain:
Hi everyone

Today, Instats (instats.org <https://instats.org>) is proud to announce a new initiative in partnership with the American Statistical Association (ASA) to empower U.S. public servants. Starting immediately, all government employees with a .gov email address can freely access our premier streaming library of expert-led research training content?the entire library of over 200 courses, with thousands of hours of content streaming in 4K, free of charge. This includes all federal, state, and local government employees with a .gov email address.

Our comprehensive library covers a range of topics from statistics and data science to advanced quantitative and qualitative research methods, designed to support the analytical skills essential for evidence-based decision making in government. By democratizing access to high-quality training, we?re investing in the continuous professional development of those who serve our communities.

Eligible government professionals can sign up at instats.org using their official .gov email to unlock this resource. Join us in advancing public service and shaping a future where informed decisions lead to lasting impact.


Best wishes

Michael Zyphur
Director
Institute for Statistical and Data Science
instats.org <http://instats.org>

Follow Instats:?Bluesky <https://bsky.app/profile/instats.bsky.social>_Linkedin <https://linkedin.com/company/instats1>_Facebook <https://www.facebook.com/InstatsTraining/>
	[[alternative HTML version deleted]]
